Summary

Public Methods
Object apply(Class<?> clazz, Class[]<?> itemTypes)
boolean equals(Object other)
We're checking if the *lazy value* is equal to another one, not if the *object* represented by the lazy value is equal to the other one.

public Object apply (Class<?> clazz, Class[]<?> itemTypes)

Parameters
clazz Class
itemTypes Class
Returns
Object

public boolean equals (Object other)

We're checking if the *lazy value* is equal to another one, not if the *object* represented by the lazy value is equal to the other one. So, if there are two lazy values and one of them has been deserialized but the other hasn't this will always return false.

Parameters
other Object
Returns
boolean

Returns
